case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS NELSON, ELIZABETH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,574.85 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, ELIZABETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, ELIZABETH
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, ELIZABETH
REM: DEFT'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST REC'D IN COURT AND TO BE RULED ON AT TRIAL-PER COMM. KAPLAN.
SIGNED ORDER TO REFUND $10.00 CONT. FEE SUBMITTED TO ACCOUNTING
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE SENT PAPERS TO JUDGE TO BE SIGNED.
DEFENDANT CONTINUANCE REQUEST DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, ELIZABETH $3,574.85 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,600.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
